plan.description: Read src/sanitize.ts and identify all missing sanitization cases. sanitizeHtml should also handle & (&), double quotes ("), and single quotes ('). sanitizeForSql should also handle backslashes and semicolons.
Fix both functions to handle all edge cases.
plan.gate: Read src/sanitize.ts and verify: sanitizeHtml handles <, >, &, double quotes, and single quotes. sanitizeForSql handles single quotes, backslashes, and semicolons. All replacements should use proper escape sequences.

initialState.task: Complete the sanitization functions to handle all common injection vectors.
